title: Even Better Enchanted Books – Hold My Enchanted Book Items
description: Even Better Enchanted Books is a resource pack that gives each enchant a better, unique texture for enchanted books — all in a clean vanilla style.
body:
# Even Better Enchanted Books

~

**Even Better Enchanted Books** is a resource pack that gives every enchantment its own unique texture for enchanted books, all in a **clean and faithful vanilla style**. Designed for clarity and immersion, each texture communicates the enchantment’s purpose without deviating from Minecraft’s visual identity. This pack is the updated and expanded successor to my old “Better Enchanted Book” resource pack, now featuring refined designs and new textures for the latest enchantments. It also introduces a brand-new feature in Minecraft 1.21.5+: **multi-enchant books**, where textures adapt dynamically based on the combination of enchantments. No dependencies are required in **Minecraft 1.21.5+**! ## Compatibility | Minecraft Version | Dependency | Special big books | |-------------------|------------|-------------------| | 1.21.5+ | ✅ None required | ✅ | | 1.21.2 – 1.21.4 | [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) | ❌ | | 1.21.1 and below | OptiFine or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) | ❌ | ## Preview ###
